title: The Knocker
description: This mod adds an unpredictable human like stalker which follows every of your steps and may visit you while sleeping...
body:
[![mado hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4d134c13be5c38e90820569398ca9c692afd3e0.png)](https://www.mado-hosting.com)

![Head Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a66f299a52f6bfde5c1942e51233b6a81f4c982_0.webp)

# The Knocker

This mod made by the creators of The Man From The Fog adds a single entity with many mechanics and events. It will stalk, jumpscare or attack you based on various situations. Thanks to the enhanced mechanics it knows where you live! For support or bugs please visit our Discord which is linked below.
